dbOperations.description: Find admin by email for credential verification
Create new server-side session record on successful login

sideEffects.name: audit_login_attempt
sideEffects.description: Audit log records both successful and failed login attempts

dbOperations.description: Check if email exists (result not exposed to client per AA-A-03)
Generate and store password reset token (24h expiry per AA-A-02)

sideEffects.name: password_reset_email
sideEffects.description: Sends password reset link via email (only if admin exists)

dbOperations.description: Validate token exists, not expired, not used
Update admin passwordHash with new password
Mark token as used (single-use enforcement)
Invalidate all existing sessions for the admin (security best practice)

sideEffects.name: audit_password_reset
sideEffects.description: Audit log records password change event

dbOperations.description: Aggregate lead counts by source and status for metrics cards
Count trials by status for conversion rate computation
Count enrollments for conversion rate and active enrollment metrics
Summarize payment statuses and amounts for revenue metrics
Fetch most recent leads ordered by createdAt DESC, limited count
Fetch upcoming trials with status SCHEDULED, date >= now
Fetch payments with status PENDING or PARTIAL, joined with enrollment for parent/program info
Fetch the single LocationSettings record (single-location MVP per ST-A-01)
Update location settings (business info, Zelle config, notification preferences). ST-A-02: Zelle fields validated — required before any program can be ACTIVE.

sideEffects.name: audit_settings_update
sideEffects.description: Audit log records settings change (affects global business behavior)

dbOperations.description: Paginated list of leads with filters (status, source, programId, search) and sorting
Read current lead status for transition validation
Update lead status (with business rule validation for valid transitions per GP-04)
Create STATUS_CHANGE activity record to track the transition
Fetch single lead with related program, location info
Update lead details (parentName, email, phone, childName, childAge, source, interestedProgramId)

sideEffects.name: audit_lead_update
sideEffects.description: Audit log records lead data change

dbOperations.description: Fetch all notes for a lead, ordered by createdAt DESC
Create new note for the lead (append-only)
Create NOTE_ADDED activity record
Fetch all activity records for a lead, ordered by createdAt DESC
Fetch lead details (email, name) for composing email
Create EMAIL_SENT activity record

sideEffects.name: trial_booking_link_email
sideEffects.description: Sends trial booking link email to lead (HO-01: lead_management -> enrollment_trial)

dbOperations.description: Fetch calendar dates filtered by programId, month, year. Includes computed spotsRemaining.
Validate programId exists
Create new calendar date (unique constraint on programId+date enforced at DB level)
Update calendar date fields (date, trialEligible, capacity, notes)
Check for existing trial bookings on this date (FK constraint guard)
Hard delete calendar date (only if no active trial bookings)

sideEffects.name: audit_calendar_date_deleted
sideEffects.description: Audit log records calendar date deletion

dbOperations.description: Fetch future trial-eligible dates with available spots for public booking form
Paginated list of programs with status filter, includes computed enrollmentCount
Fetch single program with computed fields
Validate locationId exists
Create new program (default status DRAFT)
Read current program state for transition validation
If transitioning to ACTIVE, validate Zelle config is complete (zelleRecipientName, zelleContactInfo required)
Check enrollment count vs capacity if capacity is being reduced
Update program fields

sideEffects.name: audit_program_updated
sideEffects.description: Audit log records program update (especially status transitions)

dbOperations.description: List all coupons
Create new coupon (code uniqueness enforced at DB level)
Update coupon fields (code uniqueness re-validated at DB level)
Hard delete coupon record
Paginated list of payments with filters (status, search), includes computed remainingBalance
Fetch single payment with full enrollment and program details
Read current payment state for validation (amountReceived <= amountDue, valid status transition)
Update payment status, amountReceived, paymentMethod, notes. Status auto-computed: PAID if amountReceived >= amountDue, PARTIAL if partial, WAIVED if admin sets.

sideEffects.name: audit_payment_update
sideEffects.description: Audit log records payment status change (financially sensitive)

dbOperations.description: Fetch enrollment to get programId for location lookup
Fetch program to get locationId
Fetch Zelle payment config (zelleRecipientName, zelleContactInfo, zelleInstructions)
Fetch payment record for amount due display
Paginated list of enrollments with filters (status, programId, paymentStatus, search)
Fetch single enrollment with full relations
Read current enrollment status for transition validation
Update enrollment status (ACTIVE->CANCELLED requires cancellationReason; ACTIVE->COMPLETED)

sideEffects.name: audit_enrollment_status_change
sideEffects.description: Audit log records enrollment status transition

dbOperations.description: Fetch all ACTIVE programs for public listing (GP-06: only ACTIVE status)
Fetch single program detail for public view (must be ACTIVE)
Validate trialDateId exists, is trialEligible, has capacity (spots remaining check)
Validate program is ACTIVE and exists
Check for duplicate trial booking (GP-01: one per child per program)
Check if lead exists by parentEmail (GP-02: auto-create/link)
Auto-create lead if not exists (GP-02), with status TRIAL_SCHEDULED
Auto-advance existing lead status to TRIAL_SCHEDULED if applicable (GP-04)
Create trial booking record
Create activity records (LEAD_CREATED if new lead, STATUS_CHANGE for auto-advance)

sideEffects.name: lead_created_notification
sideEffects.description: If new lead created, triggers LEAD_CREATED automation (if enabled)

sideEffects.name: trial_booked_email
sideEffects.description: Fires trial confirmation email to parent (HO-03: enrollment_trial -> communication)

dbOperations.description: Fetch program pricing fields (baseFee, feeType, registrationFee, registrationFeeRequired, totalSessions)
Validate coupon code if provided (exists, not expired, usage not exceeded)
Validate program is ACTIVE, has capacity, fetch pricing
Check for duplicate enrollment (GP-01: one per child per program)
Validate coupon if provided (exists, not expired, within usage limit)
Increment usageCount on coupon redemption
Check if lead exists by parentEmail (GP-02)
Auto-create lead if not exists (GP-02), with status ENROLLED
Auto-advance existing lead status to ENROLLED (GP-04)
Create enrollment record with price breakdown snapshot
Auto-create Payment record for the enrollment (HO-02: enrollment_trial -> payment_tracking)
Create activity records (ENROLLMENT_EVENT, STATUS_CHANGE, optionally LEAD_CREATED)

sideEffects.name: lead_created_notification
sideEffects.description: If new lead created, triggers LEAD_CREATED automation

sideEffects.name: enrollment_confirmation_email
sideEffects.description: Fires enrollment confirmation email to parent (HO-03)

dbOperations.description: Fetch enrollment details for confirmation page
Fetch location/Zelle info for payment instructions reference
List all email templates
Fetch single template with body content
Create new custom email template (GP-03: validate template variables like {{parentName}}, {{programName}})
Read existing template (verify it exists; default templates are editable but not deletable)
Update template fields (GP-03: validate template variables). Default templates can be edited.
List all 6 pre-seeded automation rules with linked template info
Validate templateId exists
Update automation config (templateId, delayMinutes, enabled toggle). No CREATE/DELETE — only 6 pre-seeded.

sideEffects.name: audit_automation_toggle
sideEffects.description: Audit log records automation enable/disable (affects email delivery behavior)

dbOperations.description: Paginated list of communication log entries with filters (deliveryStatus, triggerEvent, search)
Fetch log entry to validate status is FAILED (only FAILED emails can be retried)
Update delivery status to PENDING (will be re-sent by email worker), clear failureReason

sideEffects.name: retry_email_send
sideEffects.description: Re-queues the email for sending via email worker/service
